#2875 — docs-site build fix

Root cause was not the analytics 401 or the fumadocs warning (both red herrings). It's a Next 16 × TypeScript 7.0.2 incompatibility. Toggle the TS version to see the build outcome.

Reproduce the diagnosis

Why

Next 16.2.10 reads tsconfig.json paths via the installed typescript package to build the @/ webpack alias. It doesn't support the TS7 native compiler yet, so the alias silently drops and every @/… import fails to resolve. We're already on the latest Next — there is no newer version to update to. The other 4 ork trees stay on TS7 (they compile via tsc/esbuild, not Next).

Fix: pin docs/site to typescript ^6.0.3 (revert of #2869's over-reach into the Next app). Verified locally: ✓ Compiled successfully, 302 static pages. Separate gap (not this PR): NPM_TOKEN is expired → prod builds 401 on the real analytics package and ship a no-op stub → analytics dead in prod. Tracked separately.
